title: Quest 34869 2 Slice Toaster | Variable Browning Control | Reheat and Defrost | Crumb Tray and Cord Storage, Navy Blue
features: 2 SLICE TOASTER – Combining modern design with practical performance, this navy blue, 2 slice toaster makes a great addition to any home and is ideal for those who want to save space in their kitchen.

VARIABLE BROWNING CONTROL – With a variable browning control, you can set the toaster so that you get your perfect coloured toast every time or alternatively, use the cancel button mid-toasting to check on the colour.

REHEAT AND DEFROST OPTION – The reheat function means that you can easily warm up toast that has cooled down, perfect for those times when you are busy and miss the toast popping up. The handy defrost button allows you to toast bread straight from the freezer without the need to leave it defrosting for hours.

CRUMB TRAY AND CORD STORAGE – The toaster’s removable crumb tray makes for easy cleaning and the integrated cord storage helps keep your kitchen counter tidy. Convenient, attractive and simple to use, this toaster makes a great addition to any kitchen.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Five Unique Colours Available Quest 2 Slice Toasters These 2-Slice toasters are a kitchen essential for anyone who enjoys a satisfying piece of toast. Their reheat function means that you can easily warm up toast that has cooled down, and the handy defrost button allows you to toast bread straight from the freezer. Each toaster is designed with wide slots to fit larger slices of bread, an anti-jam function to prevent bread getting stuck, and a crumb tray to help make cleaning simple. Previous page Sleek, Smart Design The toasters are compact, and include features such as auto-centering for even toasting. Cancel, Reheat & Defrost Reheat cooled toast, defrost frozen bread, or cancel mid-toasting using the buttons on the side. Variable Browning Turn the dial to adjust the variable browning settings, with a choice of 6 different levels. Removable Crumb Tray The toaster includes a crumb tray to prevent mess, which can be removed for easy cleaning. Cord Storage The base of the toaster features built-in cord storage to keep your worktop tidy. Next page 1 Sleek, Smart Design 2 Cancel, Reheat & Defrost 3 Variable Browning 4 Removable Crumb Tray 5 Cord Storage
